L1_headline: + PEN – BSX reaffirms 2026 close; deal enhances WAMGR. | 02/04/26
L2_brief: During Boston Scientific's Q4 2025 earnings call, management reiterated that the Penumbra acquisition is expected to close in 2026, subject to customary closing conditions. CEO Mike Mahoney stated Penumbra enters BSX into new high-growth markets (mechanical thrombectomy, neurovascular) and could slightly improve BSX's weighted-average market growth rate (WAMGR). All three major rating agencies affirmed BSX's single-A-minus equivalent credit rating following the deal announcement, with Fitch upgrading its outlook from stable to positive.

L3_detailed.deal_parties: Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) acquiring Penumbra, Inc. (PEN)
L3_detailed.deal_status_update: Deal announced in January 2026; expected to close in 2026 subject to customary closing conditions. BSX will file a registration statement on Form S-4 containing a proxy statement/prospectus for Penumbra stockholders.
L3_detailed.timeline_update: Expected close in 2026. No specific quarter or date provided. The S-4 registration statement has not yet been filed.
L3_detailed.terms_update: No changes to deal terms discussed on the call. 2026 guidance explicitly excludes Penumbra.
L3_detailed.management_tone: CEO Mahoney described the deal as 'really exciting,' called it 'both strategically and financially attractive,' and stated it 'delivers significant value to patients and customers globally.' He affirmed long-range plan (LRP) targets through 2028 are unchanged and stated Penumbra further enhances the company's WAMGR.
key_messages: Penumbra provides entry into high-growth segments where BSX lacks offerings, specifically mechanical thrombectomy and neurovascular
Penumbra has a highly scaled sales force
Penumbra could slightly improve BSX's weighted-average market growth rate (WAMGR) once closed
All three major rating agencies affirmed BSX's single-A-minus equivalent credit rating post-announcement; Fitch upgraded outlook from stable to positive
BSX's 2026 guidance and LRP targets (10%+ organic revenue growth 2026-2028, 150 bps margin improvement, strong double-digit EPS growth) exclude Penumbra
BSX had $1.965 billion cash on hand and gross debt leverage ratio of 1.9x as of December 31, 2025
L3_detailed.regulatory_update: No specific regulatory approval updates provided. Filing states closing is subject to receipt of required regulatory approvals and clearances. The cautionary statement notes conditions to completion may not be satisfied at all or in a timely manner.
L3_detailed.shareholder_vote_info: BSX will file an S-4 registration statement containing a proxy statement/prospectus for Penumbra stockholders. No record date, vote date, or specific timeline for proxy mailing disclosed.
L3_detailed.integration_details: No specific integration plans, synergy estimates, or organizational changes discussed. Mahoney noted BSX is combining the reporting structure of its PI and Interventional Cardiology business units (separate from the Penumbra transaction).
risks_flagged: Closing conditions may not be satisfied at all or in a timely manner
Business disruptions in relationships with employees, customers, or suppliers following announcement and/or closing
Ability to achieve anticipated benefits and successfully integrate Penumbra's operations
Receipt of required regulatory approvals and clearances
Foreign currency fluctuations, changing trade and tariff policies, and geopolitical events
